hooks.command: file=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | bun -e "const d=JSON.parse(await Bun.stdin.text()); console.log(d.file_path||'')"); case "$file" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.json|*.jsonc) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && bunx biome format --write "$file" 2>/dev/null;; esac; exit 0

file=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | bun -e "const d=JSON.parse(await Bun.stdin.text()); console.log(d.file_path||'')"); cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"; case "$file" in *.test.ts) bun test "$file" 2>&1 | tail -20;; src/*.ts) test_file=$(echo "$file" | sed 's|^src/||' | sed 's|\.ts$|.test.ts|'); for candidate in "tests/$test_file" "tests/${test_file%/*}/${test_file##*/}"; do [ -f "$candidate" ] && bun test "$candidate" 2>&1 | tail -20 && break; done;; esac; exit 0

file=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | bun -e "const d=JSON.parse(await Bun.stdin.text()); console.log(d.file_path||'')"); case "$file" in */bun.lock|*/node_modules/*|*/dist/*|*/out/*|*/.git/*) echo 'BLOCK: This file is generated or locked — do not edit directly.' >&2; exit 2;; esac; exit 0
